title: Linux Kernel AoE Driver Use-After-Free Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges on affected installations of Linux Kernel. An attacker must first obtain the ability to execute low-privileged code on the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the AoE driver. The issue results from the lack of validating the existence of an object prior to performing operations on the object. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to escalate privileges and execute arbitrary code in the context of the kernel.
addtionnal_details: Linux has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2256786
timeline:
2023-09-29 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-03-30 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-03-30 - Advisory Updated
credit: Lucas Leong (@_wmliang_) of Trend Micro Zero Day Initiative
